subpop.note: SubPOP ships probabilities without raw counts; counts inferred at n=500 per subpop (typical Pew ATP subgroup size). Quality flag capped at 'medium' due to inferred n.

globalopinionqa.note: GlobalOpinionQA ships country probabilities without raw counts; counts inferred at n=1000 per country (typical Pew Global Attitudes survey size). Aggregate weighted by actual (country, question) coverage.

citations.text: Spearman, C. (1910); Brown, W. (1910). Spearman-Brown prophecy formula.

baselines.survey_weight_caveat: Ceiling computed from raw category counts; ignoring survey weights could shift the ceiling by 1-3% on demographically skewed subgroups.
